creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tagattie
Date: Tue May  5 07:35:28 UTC 2020
New revision: 534032
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/534032

Log:
  zoxide is a new cd alternative inspired by z and z.lua. It keeps track of the
  directories you use most frequently, and uses a ranking algorithm to navigate
  to the best match.

  WWW: https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide

  PR:		244986
  Submitted by:	Andrey Cherkashin <andoriyu@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	ehaupt (mentor)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/Makefile
  head/sysutils/zoxide/
  head/sysutils/zoxide/Makefile
  head/sysutils/zoxide/distinfo
  head/sysutils/zoxide/pkg-descr
